title: Facilitate communication and collaboration
summary: Explore DevOps capabilities such as continuous planning and continuous collaboration and prepare for Exam AZ-400: Designing and Implementing Microsoft DevOps Solutions.

sections.title: Facilitate communication and collaboration
sections.summary: Explore DevOps capabilities such as continuous planning and continuous collaboration and prepare for Exam AZ-400: Designing and Implementing Microsoft DevOps Solutions.

lessons.title: Analyze DevOps Continuous Planning and Continuous Integration
lessons.content_md:
Explore the first two capabilities in the DevOps taxonomy, Continuous Planning and Continuous Integration.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/analyze-devops-continuous-planning-intergration/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Analyze DevOps Continuous Planning and Continuous Integration

lessons.title: Introduce the foundation pillars of DevOps: Culture and Lean Product
lessons.content_md:
DevOps is the union of people, process, and products to enable continuous delivery of value to our end users. Discover the first two foundation pillars of DevOps: Culture and Lean Product.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/introduce-foundation-pillars-devops/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Introduce the foundation pillars of DevOps: Culture and Lean Product

lessons.title: Explain DevOps Continuous Delivery and Continuous Quality

Explore two capabilities in the DevOps taxonomy, Continuous Delivery and Continuous Quality.

lessons.title: Route system feedback to development teams
lessons.content_md:
Learn how continuous monitoring and dashboards give you insight into how customers use your software and where patterns of failure occur.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/route-system-feedback/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Route system feedback to development teams

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Facilitate communication and collaboration
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Facilitate communication and collaboration**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
